vevent.summary: Dr. Alford Quarterly Visit - Charlotte Hungerford, Torrington
vevent.location: Charlotte Hungerford Hospital Outpatient Clinic, 540 Litchfield St, Torrington, CT 06790
vevent.description: Primary care with Dr. Steven Alford. Bring medication list. Review BP log. Ask about nocturnal oxygen follow-up from Dr. Chowdhury.

vevent.location: Charlotte Hungerford Hospital, Pulmonology Dept, 540 Litchfield St, Torrington, CT 06790
vevent.description: Six-month pulmonology check. Bring Spiriva inhaler and albuterol. Review spirometry from June. Discuss overnight oxygen trial results.

vevent.summary: Oxygen Concentrator Setup - Delivery at Home
vevent.description: Medical supply delivery for 1L nocturnal oxygen concentrator. Rx from Dr. Chowdhury. David will be present.

vevent.summary: Dr. Alford Quarterly Visit - Charlotte Hungerford, Torrington
vevent.location: Charlotte Hungerford Hospital Outpatient Clinic, 540 Litchfield St, Torrington, CT 06790
vevent.description: Quarterly primary care. Post-bronchitis follow-up. Bring updated BP log Oct-Feb. David driving.

vevent.location: Charlotte Hungerford Hospital, Pulmonology Dept, 540 Litchfield St, Torrington, CT 06790
vevent.description: Post-exacerbation pulmonology follow-up. January bronchitis episode. Confirm 1L nocturnal O2 continuing. Spirometry recheck.
Twice-yearly cleaning and exam. Six months since July 2025 visit.
Tiotropium (Spiriva) 30-day supply refill. Call ahead if running low early.

vevent.summary: Dr. Alford Quarterly Visit - Charlotte Hungerford
vevent.location: Charlotte Hungerford Hospital Outpatient Clinic, 540 Litchfield St, Torrington, CT 06790
vevent.description: Next quarterly primary care visit. Bring updated BP log. David driving.

vevent.summary: Dr. Chowdhury Pulmonology - Six Month Visit
vevent.location: Charlotte Hungerford Hospital, Pulmonology Dept, 540 Litchfield St, Torrington, CT 06790
vevent.description: Six-month pulmonology check. Continued COPD Stage II management. Oxygen concentrator review.
Twice-yearly cleaning, six months from January 2026 visit.
Annual review window for Medigap supplemental coverage. Policy CTF-2019-8847-M renews December 1. Call David to review options.
